textByHash.77e347a02ce2957b768dd464eca086b8f22f551b: Thank goodness you opened that door! I've been trapped here since last night!
textByHash.39d3e23a74d600c2ddf2b4fbcbfe9cb97915bcce: Well, that's really none of your business.
textByHash.4e2104a813135a4244b79af671b46a12c4264d16: No. You're wrong. Now go away.
textByHash.10e3ee0e64527b455d5f06b3a7f7d041e4b60d15: Don't tell me a novice like YOU has found it!
textByHash.df944cf59e3e316be01c05a51d71d4600080d32d: ...I cannot believe that someone like YOU could find the portal where experienced adventurers such as ourselves could not.
